DP.176.0000:
Well, well.\f
You’re quite the adorable Trainer,
but you’ve also got a spine.\f
Ahaha!
I’m Bertha.\f
I have a preference for Ground-type
Pokémon.\f
Well, would you show this old lady
how much you’ve learned?\f
DP.176.0001:
You’re quite something, youngster.\f
I like how you and your Pokémon
earned the win by working as one.\f
That’s what makes you so strong.\f
Ahahaha! I think that you can
go as far as you want.
DP.176.0002:
The Trainer in the next room is a
much more formidable opponent.\f
You really must have your wits
about you.\f
However, I think you can go as far
as you desire. Ahahaha!
